ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently injured */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Details about the player's injury (if any) */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport the team participates in */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach leading the team */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the team is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player for whom the metrics are recorded */,
  "week_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player's performance this week */,
  "last_week_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player's performance last week */,
  "rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played */,
  "avg_distance" TEXT /* Average distance from the hole */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered in feet */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made */,
  "relative_to_par" TEXT /* Performance relative to par */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session or match */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the player's shots */,
  "consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the player's performance */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed achieved by the player */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the player */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance covered by the player */,
  "min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance covered by the player */,
  "distance_range" TEXT /* Distance range (e.g., 50-75 yards) */,
  "wearable_device_id" TEXT /* ID of the wearable device used to capture data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Player) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for coach, 3 for analyst, 4 for player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role identifier for the user's access level */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team conducting the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session is held */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach conducting the session */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the session */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., practice, match) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_metrics" (
  "session_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session these metrics relate to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player related to the metrics */,
  "avg_score" REAL /* Average score achieved by the player in the session */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total attempts made by the player in the session */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the player in the session */,
  "distance_range" TEXT /* Distance range (e.g., 50-75 yards) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed during the session */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the session */,
  "wearable_device_id" TEXT /* ID of the wearable device used to capture data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for historical data entries */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player related to the historical data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric related */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded performance */,
  "avg_distance" TEXT /* Average distance from hole at the time of recording */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total attempts made at the time of recording */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session or match */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the player's shots */,
  "consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the player's performance */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed achieved by the player */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the player */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance covered by the player */,
  "min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance covered by the player */,
  "distance_range" TEXT /* Distance range (e.g., 50-75 yards) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., practice, match) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
